plant.title: Norfolk Island Pine
plant.summary: Norfolk Island Pines are soft, feathery evergreens that tolerate indoor conditions well. They are non-toxic to cats and dogs, providing a safe, miniature tree-like presence.
plant.contentHtml: Araucaria heterophylla, native to Norfolk Island in the Pacific, is often used as a living Christmas tree due to its symmetric shape. It prefers bright light and moist but well-drained soil. While it can grow quite tall outdoors, indoors it remains manageable. The plant's delicate, needle-like leaves add a gentle texture to interior spaces.
